children.name: div
children.textContent: Pick a tool to feel better

children.name: div
children.textContent: Slow your breath, slow your heart

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9B90C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Move your body to move your mood

children.name: svg

children.textContent: Give yourself time to feel better

children.name: div
children.textContent: "When you feel a big feeling, pause before you act. Count to 5 in your head. You've got this!"
